empty_beat_logic.definition: Removing the Kick/Snare on the expected 'downbeat' (1.1.1 or 2.1.1)
empty_beat_logic.execution: Silence Δt (1/4 note) followed by Sub-drop + Glitch-fill
empty_beat_logic.psychological_effect: Sudden weightlessness followed by extreme impact (G-Inversion)
empty_beat_logic.trigger: Every 32 or 64 bars to break the loop-hypnosis
empty_beat_logic.rule: Empty-beat must be followed by a change in Layer 2 theme.
